title: LLP Chat Delegation Status NDJSON Event
description: NDJSON event emitted by chat-proxy on the turn-2+ stream when llp-chat-followup delegates to a sub-agent. Frontend chat-message.tsx consumes this to render the 'checking sources...' indicator and the 'Verified' badge. Companion to delegation-request-schema.json (which is the follow-up to-sub payload). Phase A: state transitions are pending -> complete (or pending -> error). Phase B may add streaming partial updates.

event.description: Discriminator. NDJSON consumer dispatches on this field. Other event types in the same stream: 'token', 'citation', 'clarify_options', 'citations_audit', 'coverage_additions'.

trace_id.description: Echoed from the originating delegation_request. Lets frontend correlate the status event with the in-flight delegation.

agent.description: Which sub-agent the status applies to.

intent.description: Echoed from the request. Frontend may show this in the indicator text (e.g. 'Verifying section citation...').

state.description: pending: sub-agent invoked, awaiting response. complete: response received, included in result payload. error: sub-agent failed. timeout: max_response_ms exceeded; followup proceeded without sub-agent input.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Set when state=pending is first emitted.

finished_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Set when state in {complete, error, timeout}.

result_summary.description: One-line human summary for the badge tooltip. Examples: 'Cited DOC-011 §27 confirmed.', 'Original cite was DOC-006 §26 — corrected to DOC-011 §27.', 'Claim outside Universe dataset; surfaced as unverified.'. Present when state=complete.

verdict.description: For agent=llp-chat-verify, state=complete. Drives badge color: agree=green, partial=amber, disagree=red, not_verifiable=grey.

error_message.description: Human-readable error reason. Present when state in {error, timeout}.

examples.result_summary: Cited DOC-011 §27 confirmed; notice period is 120 days for permanent workers.
Original cite was DOC-007 BDT 25,000 — corrected: DOC-007 r.118 sets penalty up to BDT 50,000.

examples.error_message: verify did not respond within 12000ms; followup proceeded with unverified badge.
